llmConnector.title: Investigation LLM
llmConnector.description: Select Core's investigation LLM connector. Default is local Ornith 9B on :8081. Switch to DeepSeek V4 Flash when Ornith reports a context overflow.
llmConnector.errorLoad: Failed to load LLM connector status from Core.
llmConnector.credsNote: DeepSeek credentials come from the operator host at runtime (~/.config/opencode, ~/.pi/agent/auth.json, or env vars). They are never committed to the repo.
llmConnector.overflowHint: When Core returns {code}, switch to DeepSeek V4 Flash (OpenCode Go or NVIDIA NIM).

investigationLlmProfiles.title: Investigation LLM
investigationLlmProfiles.description: Create OpenAI-compatible Investigation LLM profiles for your tenant. API keys are stored by Core and never returned after save.
investigationLlmProfiles.errorActivate: Failed to activate Investigation LLM profile.
investigationLlmProfiles.errorUpdate: Failed to update Investigation LLM profile.
investigationLlmProfiles.errorDelete: Failed to delete Investigation LLM profile.
investigationLlmProfiles.errorLoad: Failed to load Investigation LLM profiles from Core.
investigationLlmProfiles.errorCreate: Failed to create Investigation LLM profile.
investigationLlmProfiles.validationRequired: Label, base URL, and model are required.
investigationLlmProfiles.validationContextWindow: Context window must be a positive integer.
investigationLlmProfiles.apiKeyMaskedPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep existing key
investigationLlmProfiles.apiKeyMaskedHint: API key is configured. Enter a new value only to replace it.
investigationLlmProfiles.adminOnly: Only admins can create or edit Investigation LLM profiles.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Manage API keys for external integrations
apiKeys.name: Key Name
apiKeys.revokeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to revoke "{name}"? This action cannot be undone. All requests using this key will stop working immediately.
apiKeys.errorCreating: Failed to create API key. Please try again.
apiKeys.errorRevoking: Failed to revoke API key. Please try again.
apiKeys.keyWarning: Save this key now. You won’t be able to see it again.
apiKeys.empty: No API keys yet. Create one to get started.
apiKeys.adminOnly: Only admins can manage API keys.
